# ai-tools-widget

Public hosting (via GitHub Pages) for the Always Greater lesson chat widget.

The only file that matters here is `ai-tools-widget.v1.js`, served at:

```
https://dfonvielle.github.io/ai-tools-widget/ai-tools-widget.v1.js
```

**Do not edit files here by hand.** The widget is built in the private
`ai_tools` repo and copied here by its `tools/deploy-widget.sh` script:

```bash
cd ~/Desktop/coding_projects/ai_tools
tools/deploy-widget.sh ../ai-tools-widget
```
